title: [ExportVerilog] Wire declaration and definition "_tmp" output twice
body:
I haven't tracked this down, but in a certain condition this line is emitted twice (identically) in different areas in the same scope:

```
  wire [31:0][7:0] _tmp = {{_T_9}, {_T_10}, {_T_11}, {_T_12}, {_T_13}, {_T_14}, {_T_15}, {_T_16}, {_T_17}, {_T_18}, {_T_19}, {_T_20}, {_T_21}, {_T_22}, {_T_23}, {_T_24}, {_T_25}, {_T_26}, {_T_27}, {_T_28}, {_T_29}, {_T_30}, {_T_31}, {_T_32}, {_T_33}, {_T_34}, {_T_35}, {_T_36}, {_T_37}, {_T_38}, {_T_39}, {_T_40}};
```

The wire name points to https://github.com/llvm/circt/blob/main/lib/Translation/ExportVerilog/ExportVerilog.cpp#L956. I'll look into this further later, but I figured there is a decent chance that would be enough for @lattner to know what's going on.
